headline: Assessing Lockheed Martin (LMT) Valuation After Strong Recent Share Price And Total Return Performance
summary: Lockheed Martin (LMT) has drawn fresh investor attention after recent performance data showed a 3.6% year to date total return and a 53.8% total return over the past year, alongside annual revenue of US$75.0b. See our latest analysis for Lockheed Martin. The recent 2.83% 1 day and 6.70% 30 day share price returns, alongside a 36.14% year to date share price return, reflect building momentum on top of a 53.82% 1 year total shareholder return. If Lockheed Martin has you thinking about defense...
